parameters.text:
=You are a career advisor helping a developer student evaluate job opportunities.

Here is the candidate's profile:
- Name: Slim Khardani
- Education: Computer Engineering student at ISSAT Sousse, Tunisia
- Experience: 7 years IT Technician + Final year internship as Web & Blockchain Developer
- Main project: HashGov — decentralized identity platform on Hedera Hashgraph
- Stack: React.js, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Hedera Hashgraph, JavaScript, Python
- Looking for: Remote internship

Here is the job opportunity:
- Company: {{ $json.body.company }}
- Job Title: {{ $json.body.jobTitle }}
- Job Description: {{ $json.body.jobDescription }}

Please analyze and return:

1. MATCH SCORE: X/10
2. MATCHING SKILLS: list skills from the JD that Slim already has
3. MISSING SKILLS: list skills from the JD that Slim needs to learn
4. TIME TO FILL GAPS: estimated time to learn missing skills
5. RECOMMENDATION: Should he apply? (Yes / Maybe / No) with a short reason
6. SUGGESTED ANGLE: How should Slim position himself in the cover email for this specific role?

parameters.content:
# 🎯 CV-to-Job Matcher
Sends a job description via webhook → Gemini
analyzes your CV fit → emails you a full report

## ⚙️ Setup Required
1. Gemini API Key → aistudio.google.com
2. Gmail OAuth2 → connected in n8n
3. Update YOUR CV details in the LLM prompt

## 🚀 How to Use
Send a POST request to the webhook URL:

curl -X POST YOUR_WEBHOOK_URL \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "jobTitle": "Developer Intern",
    "company": "Company Name",
    "jobDescription": "paste JD here"
  }'

## ✏️ Customize
- Update YOUR profile in the LLM prompt
- Change email recipient in Gmail node
- Add more fields: salary, location, remote/onsite

## 🔌 What is the Webhook here?

The Webhook is the TRIGGER of this workflow.
Instead of running the workflow manually,
you send it a job description from your terminal
and it starts automatically.

HOW TO USE:
Copy this command, paste the job description,
and run it in your terminal:

curl -X POST YOUR_WEBHOOK_URL \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "jobTitle": "Developer Intern",
    "company": "Company Name",
    "jobDescription": "paste the full JD here"
  }'

WHY NOT PDF?
Your CV is hardcoded in the AI prompt (it rarely
changes). Only the job description changes each
time — so you send that via webhook.

UPGRADE IDEA 💡
A future version could accept a PDF upload
and extract CV text dynamically.
